---
title: "About the Authors"
---

**Katie Rosenberg** is a parent and school librarian at L&N STEM Academy in Knoxville, TN. She discovered the joy of family hiking after moving to Knoxville in 2018 and has since explored trails across the Tennessee Valley, Cumberland Plateau, and the Great Smoky Mountains with her family.

**Joshua Rosenberg** is a parent and a faculty member in the College of Education, Health, and Human Sciences at the University of Tennessee, Knoxville. He has hiked and camped throughout East Tennessee and believes that getting outside with kids — even when it's messy and imperfect — is one of the best things a family can do together.

Together, Katie and Joshua have hiked all 30 trails in this book with their two children.

---

*Little Kids, Big Adventures: A Guide to Family Hikes Around Knoxville* will be published in 2026 by the **University of Tennessee Press**.

[← Back to Home](index.qmd)
